'''Panna Prime''', also known as the '''Mud Moon of Panna''', and as the '''red-water moon''', was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] located in the [[Panna system/Legends|Panna system]] that [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] the [[planet]] [[Panna/Legends|Panna]] along with two other moons.

==History==
[[File:Panna_City.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Panna City on the surface of the mud moon]]
The entire moon was covered in a gelid ocean consisting of mud in which many different creatures dwelt. The moon was inhabited and had at least [[Panna City|one city]] which catered to many different alien species. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] had a presence on the moon during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="TSOTFW" />

In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] crash-landed the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], transporting an ill [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] on the moon. [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] [[Mission to Panna Prime|encountered]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] near Panna City when Luke landed his [[BTL-S3 Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]] there searching for the ''Falcon''{{'s}} crew. Although Fett at first appeared to be a friend, and helped the droids find a cure for and Solo's [[Sleeping virus|illness]], which Skywalker had also contracted, at the time, Luke and R2 eventually learned that his intentions were to locate the Rebel base for [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. Fett escaped via his [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpack]] after his true intentions were revealed.<ref name="TSOTFW" />

The inhabitants of the moon were known for their distinct hotcakes, simply called [[Panna cake]]s. This recipe was popular enough to be exported off-world, and served in locations such as [[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="DAD">{{Hyperspace|url=fans/hyperspace/source/dexdiner/index.html|text=Dining at Dex's|int=Dining at Dex's}}</ref>

{{Moon-stub}}
